basic_details.job_title: KIMS Bangalore Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 27 Coding Clerk, ECG Technician and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: ECG Technician, Technician-bed side lab, Manifold Operators, EEG/ENMG Technician, OT Technician/Anesthesia Technician, Coding Clerk, Record Clerk
basic_details.short_information: Kempegowda Institute of Medical Sciences (KIMS) has released the official ECG Technician, Technician-bed side lab, Manifold Operators, EEG/ENMG Technician, OT Technician/Anesthesia Technician, Coding Clerk, and Record Clerk Recruitment Notification 2026 on 17 July 2026 at the official website. A total of 27 vacancies have been announced under the KIMS Bangalore Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged between 22 and 30 years with qualifications including B.Sc Echo/Cardiology, B.Sc/M.Sc Lab Technician, Manifold Operator Certificate, B.Sc EEG Technician/Neurophysiology, B.Sc OT Technician, Dip

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 22 years Maximum Age: 30 years Age relaxation rules will be as per government norms.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Sc Echo/Cardiology, B.Sc/M.Sc Lab Technician, Manifold Operator Certificate, B.Sc EEG Technician/Neurophysiology, B.Sc OT Technician, Diploma with Medical Coding experience of 5 years, Degree with Medical Record Management experience of 5 years
qualification.details: ECG Technician: B.Sc Echo/Cardiology Technician-bed side lab: B.Sc/M.Sc Lab Technician Manifold Operators: Manifold Operator Certificate EEG/ENMG Technician: B.Sc EEG Technician/Neurophysiology OT Technician/Anesthesia Technician: B.Sc OT Technician Coding Clerk: Diploma with Medical Coding experience of 5 years Record Clerk: Degree with Medical Record Management experience of 5 years

salary_details.details: Please refer to the official notification for salary details.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for KIMS Bangalore Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.kimsbangalore.edu.in/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 22-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: KIMS Bangalore Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the KIMS Bangalore Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download KIMS Bangalore Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: KIMS Bangalore Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: ECG Technician: B.Sc Echo/Cardiology Technician-bed side lab: B.Sc/M.Sc Lab Technician Manifold Operators: Manifold Operator Certificate EEG/ENMG Technician: B.Sc EEG Technician/Neurophysiology OT Technician/Anesthesia Technician: B.Sc OT Technician Coding Clerk: Diploma with Medical Coding experience of 5 years Record Clerk: Degree with Medical Record Management experience of 5 years

content_sections.heading: KIMS Bangalore Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 22 years Maximum Age: 30 years Age relaxation rules will be as per government norms.

content_sections.heading: KIMS Bangalore Salary 2026
content_sections.text: Please refer to the official notification for salary details.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for KIMS Bangalore Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.kimsbangalore.edu.in/. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 22-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for KIMS Bangalore Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for KIMS Bangalore Recruitment 2026 is 22 July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the specified address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in KIMS Bangalore Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 27 vacancies announced for various posts including ECG Technician, Technician-bed side lab, Manifold Operators, and others in KIMS Bangalore Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for KIMS Bangalore Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for the posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit is 22 years and the maximum age limit is 30 years for all the posts announced in KIMS Bangalore Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q5. Are there any application fees for KIMS Bangalore Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the KIMS Bangalore Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q6. What are the educational qualifications required for the posts?
faq.answer: Educational qualifications vary by post, including B.Sc degrees in relevant fields like Echo/Cardiology, Lab Technician, EEG Technician, OT Technician, and diplomas with specific experience for Coding Clerk and Record Clerk.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for KIMS Bangalore Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process for KIMS Bangalore Recruitment 2026 will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of Kempegowda Institute of Medical Sciences. The link will be provided in the "Important Links" section.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required to be submitted with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and relevant educational certificates with the application form.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of Kempegowda Institute of Medical Sciences?
faq.answer: The official website of Kempegowda Institute of Medical Sciences is the primary source for all recruitment-related information and application forms. You can find the link in the "Important Links" section.
